human_review_reason: Phase 2 and earlier phase completion are reflected in migration state and symbol ownership/imports are in the expected places, and the tree is clean, but the precondition’s “full test suite passes” requirement has no fresh verification evidence available in this check.
name: src-continuous-refactoring-scope-expansi-20260422T000028

phases.name: characterize-discovery
phases.precondition: The migration is still in planning or ready state, `scope_expansion.py` still defines and exports `ScopeCandidate`, `ScopeCandidateKind`, and `build_scope_candidates`, and no `src/continuous_refactoring/scope_candidates.py` module exists.

phases.name: extract-scope-candidates
phases.precondition: Phase 1 is complete: discovery behavior is covered by focused tests, `build_scope_candidates()` has a clear internal discovery flow, and all tests pass with the public symbols still exported from `scope_expansion.py`.

phases.name: trim-expansion-orchestration
phases.precondition: Phase 2 is complete: `scope_candidates.py` owns candidate data and discovery, moved symbols are imported directly from their new module, no compatibility shims exist in `scope_expansion.py`, and the full test suite passes.

phases.name: contract-sweep
phases.precondition: Phases 1 through 3 are complete: candidate discovery lives in `scope_candidates.py`, selection orchestration remains in `scope_expansion.py`, candidate formatting has a single final home, and the full test suite passes.
